title: M2 Candidate-B Stage1d Outcome
body: Campaign `m2_candidate_b_stage1d_10m_20260304T063126Z` completed 10M timesteps per seed with the stage1d recovery curriculum (vy fixed to 0, narrow yaw-rate range, slower command resampling, randomization off).
Final aggregate (m2_stage1d_gate): success_rate median=0.0000, command_tracking_success_rate median=0.0000, fall_rate median=0.3333.
Final aggregate errors (m2_stage1d_gate): median_command_vx_rmse_mps=0.1588, median_command_vy_rmse_mps=0.1183, median_command_yaw_rate_rmse_rps=1.0238, median_final_pos_error_m=4.9073.
Reference on m2_nominal at final eval: command_tracking_success_rate median=0.0000, median_command_yaw_rate_rmse_rps=1.0472, fall_rate median=0.6667.

campaign.notes: 4 seeds, 2 jobs per GPU, 32 envs/job, init warm-start from candidate-A update_000300.
